description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular design. The frame features a textured grip for secure handling, and the trigger guard is slightly squared with a reinforced lower edge. The slide has subtle serrations for improved manipulation and is equipped with visible iron sights, including a front sight with a colored dot. The barrel is medium-length and appears to have a ported or vented compensator at the muzzle, enhancing recoil control. The magazine base is slightly flared and extends below the grip, providing additional surface area for a firm hold.
description: A matte black, semi-automatic handgun with a textured grip, ported barrel, and flared magazine base. Features include slide serrations, iron sights, and a robust, angular frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with a ported or vented compensator and the squared-off trigger guard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slide serrations, iron sights, and the detailed grip texture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the slide, rear sight, and the full contour of the grip.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, slide details, and the ergonomic grip design.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with ergonomic shaping to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a textured surface pattern for enhanced traction. The material appears to be a matte black polymer with subtle stippling and possible finger grooves for improved control. The base of the grip is slightly flared, and there are no visible logos or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and slightly squared with a reinforced lower edge, providing extra protection and structural integrity. It is of medium thickness and size, with a smooth finish and no visible texturing or undercuts. The design is practical, with a slight forward extension that may accommodate tactical accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length and features a ported or vented compensator at the muzzle, which is designed to reduce recoil and muzzle rise. The exterior is finished in matte black, matching the slide, and there are no visible threads or fluting. The barrel appears solid and functional, with no decorative markings.
attribute_slide_markings: There is a small, subtle marking on the left side of the slide, possibly indicating a model or serial number, but no prominent manufacturer logos or decorative engravings are visible. The markings are minimal and blend with the matte finish, maintaining a low-profile appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly flared and extends below the grip, providing additional surface area for a secure hold. It has a flat bottom with beveled edges and no visible finger rest, logos, or texturing. The design is simple and functional, emphasizing ease of magazine changes.
